items.q: How do I set up VPN on iOS?
items.a: Open «My Devices», select your iOS device and tap «Configure». Follow the instructions — the app will open automatically and import the subscription.

items.q: How do I set up VPN on Android?
items.a: In «My Devices», pick your Android device, download the recommended app, then scan the QR code or paste the subscription link.
We accept cards, SBP, cryptocurrency and Telegram payments. The exact set depends on your region and is shown in the payment window when topping up your balance.

items.q: How do I renew my subscription?
items.a: Top up your balance on the Profile page. Renewal happens automatically when the current paid period ends.

items.q: How do I link Telegram to my account?
items.a: On the Profile page click «Link Telegram» and confirm authorization through the widget. Once linked, payment and device notifications will arrive in the bot chat.

items.q: I forgot my password, what should I do?
items.a: On the login page click «Forgot password?» and enter your email. A reset link will be sent to it. If no email is linked — message support chat.
iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Linux. Each platform has its own clients — the list of apps is shown inside the device card.

items.q: Can I connect from multiple devices?
items.a: Yes. Each device is a separate subscription. Add a new device in «My Devices» and pay for it.
